name: Nachos to Share
description: Crispy house-made corn tortilla chips layered with warm cheese sauce, jalapeños, pico de gallo and sour cream.

name: Macho Style Chicken French Fries
description: Golden fries topped with grilled chicken chunks, melted cheddar, smoky BBQ drizzle and green onions.

name: Loaded Garden French Fries
description: Crispy fries with cheese sauce, bell peppers, olives, corn and fresh herbs.

name: Butter Garlic Prawns
description: Plump prawns sautéed in butter garlic sauce with parsley and lemon.

name: Cheese Corn Balls
description: Golden croquettes stuffed with sweet corn kernels and melted mozzarella.

name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
description: Toasted bread with garlic butter, mozzarella and Italian herbs.

name: Paneer Burrito
description: Flour tortilla wrap packed with grilled paneer, onions, peppers, rice and sour cream.

name: Chicken Burrito Bowl
description: Grilled adobo chicken, rice, beans, corn salsa and shredded cheese over crisp lettuce.

name: Paneer Quesadilla
description: Tandoori paneer crumbles, onions and melting mozzarella in a golden tortilla.

name: Chicken Momos
description: Steamed or fried dumplings stuffed with seasoned minced chicken and scallions.

name: Veg Momos
description: Dumplings stuffed with cabbage, carrots, beans and ginger. Steamed or fried.

name: Classic Margherita Pizza
description: Fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella, basil and olive oil on a crisp base.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Smoky BBQ chicken, onions, bell peppers and mozzarella cheese.

name: White Sauce Penne Pasta
description: Penne pasta tossed in creamy white sauce with herbs and vegetables.

name: Premium Cheddar Chicken Burger
description: Crispy chicken patty, cheddar, lettuce, tomato and signature cafe sauce.

name: Spicy Paneer Burger
description: Crispy paneer patty, fresh veggies, cheese and spicy mayo.

name: Classic Cappuccino
description: Rich espresso topped with steamed milk and silky foam.

name: Spanish Latte
description: Chilled espresso with creamy milk and condensed milk sweetness.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: Mint, lime and soda served chilled for a refreshing cafe drink.

name: Chocolate Waffle with Ice Cream
description: Warm waffle topped with chocolate sauce, ice cream and crunchy sprinkles.
